This announcement marks a pivotal moment in the ongoing debate and scientific research surrounding the long-term health impacts of football, particularly the repetitive head injuries that players endure. CTE is a degenerative brain disease associated with repeated blows to the head, and its symptoms can include memory loss, confusion, depression, and progressive dementia.
